scripts.typecheck: node --check bin/gist.mjs && node --check src/budgets.mjs && node --check src/identity.mjs && node --check src/report.mjs && node --check src/enrichment.mjs && node --check src/ingest.mjs && node --check src/publisher.mjs && node --check src/webhook.mjs
scripts.build: node bin/gist.mjs build --config demo/gist.config.json --evidence demo/evidence.json --out dist/demo
